ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the bug */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current state of the bug (e.g., Open, Accepted, Closed) */,
  "reported_release" TEXT /* Release in which the bug was reported */,
  "target_release" TEXT /* Target release for resolving the bug */,
  "workaround" TEXT /* Workaround for the bug, if available */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes associated with the fix */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the bug */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the bug (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the bug (e.g., Critical, Major, Minor) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels assigned to the bug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_reported_release FOREIGN KEY ("reported_release") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_target_release FOREIGN KEY ("target_release") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "release_name" TEXT /* Name of the release */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the release was published */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the release belongs to */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Type of release (e.g., Major, Minor, Patch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the development team responsible for the product */,
  "product_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the product manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the development team */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "bug_id" TEXT /* ID of the bug the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "attachment_type" TEXT /* Type of attachment (e.g., image, document, code) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_attachments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "bug_id" TEXT /* ID of the bug the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was added */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_comments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, manager) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state change */,
  "bug_id" TEXT /* ID of the bug that changed state */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_state" TEXT /* Previous state of the bug */,
  "new_state" TEXT /* New state of the bug */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the state was changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the state change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_history_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "bug_id" TEXT /* ID of the primary bug */,
  "related_bug_id" TEXT /* ID of the related bug */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., Duplicate, Related) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_relations_related_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_relations_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_tags" (
  "bug_id" TEXT /* ID of the bug */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
